programme.title: Amber Alert
programme.desc: A troubled young man hijacks a bus load of school children. Meanwhile Detective Amber Cross (Alaina Huffman), battling with her own demons and issues, is called in to negotiate

programme.title: Death By Friendship
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller with Natalie Brown. Recently divorced Hope thinks her struggling daughter is back on track when she bonds with Cassie, whose parents also split. But is Cassie a friend or a foe?

programme.title: A Deadly Lullaby
programme.desc: After losing her child, Olivia meets a woman and her daughter.

programme.title: The Hunter's Prayer
programme.desc: (2017) High-octane thriller starring Sam Worthington. An assassin hired to kill a young woman ends up falling for her instead. Together, they team up to avenge her father's death.

programme.title: Redemption Day
programme.desc: (2021) Action thriller with Gary Dourdan, Serinda Swan and Andy Garcia. A war hero embarks on a daring rescue mission when his wife is kidnapped. As the clock counts down, can he get to her in time?
